subject: (no subject)
body:
████ had emailed me a couple of times. over the past 2 months. after I sent her that note she said she had little money, couldnt afford air condintioner. was living on a friends couch. really needed money. !!!!! 'I sent her some " , your friend bill is nuts. his former girl . cant afford air con, , cant affrod to travel to bridge , she said that sharon osborne used to arrange. . the lawyer helped her with papers. so she is ok, but broke. . that story would take trump off the front pages The richest man in the world is so cheap, his former bridge girl and toy , lives on a friends sofa. . WOWO

--
